title: Adventurous Garlic Vietnamese Stir-fry
description: A garlicky and tender Vietnamese dish featuring seasoned rice vinegar that is both adventurous in flavor and gluten-free-friendly.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add sliced chicken and cook until golden brown, about 4 minutes on each side.
Remove the chicken from the wok and set aside.
In the same pan, add garlic, green onions, fish sauce, tamarind paste, and cornstarch mixed with water to create a slurry. Stir well to combine.
Pour in rice vinegar and bring it to a boil until the mixture thickens slightly, about 2 minutes.
Return the chicken to the pan and stir until coated evenly with the sauce.
Serve hot as an adventurous and flavorful side dish or main course.
